TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Losing_Watan, title = Losing_Watan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Losing_Watan} }

S.FORM: Losing Watan lalu nya hiya, lalu nya Nipun hiya ga Nu Saburo, qutux seng spat kbhul qesux pgal qesux ryax spat byaling mpux tiyu ryax htagn nya sta qutux seng qesux kbhul miman payat ryax payat byaling mpux pitu ryax mpyut ro hnuqil, hiya ga cquliq Tayal mc;ubuy squliq hngiyang nya, hiya ga mrhuw na Taywan Genzyuminrok, piyux calay shiyu na ke hiya wayal bhlun Kokuminto na Cina ro wayal naha pqilun ryax na Kwiran na mlabuw sbhul. qutux seng qesux kbhul pusan qutux ryax tmsuqan pinqwasan nya bih "Tajvano Reganto medicina lernejo" qutux seng qesux kbhul pusan qutux ryax mpux byaling ga mbinah qalang Tayal, mnaki bih byaoying na Kowgan, b'bu Kapan, skura nguhux ruma, ru qnazi kya. calay ga twang psbaq yaw na klkah hi, twang sbaq yaw na htgan llaqi, maki calay pintyawan nya yaw igok na qalang na Tayal qa Losing Watan qani, qutux loyi ga musa mtama galan gnbang ke qa Tayal ki Sexu na Nipun qa hiya uyi. kya hayi qutux seng qesux kbhul spatula magal kawas payat ryax nasa gam tama gi-ying qa "Tajvano Guberniestro" tmsuqanminsaying qa pintriqan na cinbwanan qani lga, mbinah kinhulan nya qalang msbtunux kya, ro wayal mtama te qutux cintman na Taywan singgiying ryax qa qutux seng kawas qesux kbhul miman saying ryax nasa, ptnaq kawas kya, kya hayi mupx qutux byaling skura yaw na wayal msqun mlahuy "Takasago familio konsilio", snyan naha Kyosato qa Watan Losing qani ro yupun naha ulu, ryax nasa gluw na Cho qa saying hi ga ptnaqan naha pyapun ro yupun kulu uyi. Bnrwan qa galan cpung .

Losing Watan lalu nya hiya, lalu nya Nipun hiya ga Nu Saburo, qutux seng spat kbhul qesux pgal qesux ryax spat byaling mpux tiyu ryax htagn nya sta qutux seng qesux kbhul miman payat ryax payat byaling mpux pitu ryax mpyut ro hnuqil, hiya ga cquliq Tayal mc;ubuy squliq hngiyang nya, hiya ga mrhuw na Taywan Genzyuminrok, piyux calay shiyu na ke hiya wayal bhlun Kokuminto na Cina ro wayal naha pqilun ryax na Kwiran na mlabuw sbhul. qutux seng qesux kbhul pusan qutux ryax tmsuqan pinqwasan nya bih "Tajvano Reganto medicina lernejo" qutux seng qesux kbhul pusan qutux ryax mpux byaling ga mbinah qalang Tayal, mnaki bih byaoying na Kowgan, b'bu Kapan, skura nguhux ruma, ru qnazi kya. calay ga twang psbaq yaw na klkah hi, twang sbaq yaw na htgan llaqi, maki calay pintyawan nya yaw igok na qalang na Tayal qa Losing Watan qani, qutux loyi ga musa mtama galan gnbang ke qa Tayal ki Sexu na Nipun qa hiya uyi. kya hayi qutux seng qesux kbhul spatula magal kawas payat ryax nasa gam tama gi-ying qa "Tajvano Guberniestro" tmsuqanminsaying qa pintriqan na cinbwanan qani lga, mbinah kinhulan nya qalang msbtunux kya, ro wayal mtama te qutux cintman na Taywan singgiying ryax qa qutux seng kawas qesux kbhul miman saying ryax nasa, ptnaq kawas kya, kya hayi mupx qutux byaling skura yaw na wayal msqun mlahuy "Takasago familio konsilio", snyan naha Kyosato qa Watan Losing qani ro yupun naha ulu, ryax nasa gluw na Cho qa saying hi ga ptnaqan naha pyapun ro yupun kulu uyi. Bnrwan qa galan cpung .
S.PHON: los~Й•iЕ‹ watan lalu nja Д§ija, lalu nja nipun Д§ija ЙЈa nu s~Й•aОІuro, qutux s~Й•eЕ‹ s~Й•pat kОІД§ul qes~Й•ux pЙЈal qes~Й•ux rjax s~Й•pat ОІjaliЕ‹ mpux tiju rjax Д§taЙЈn nja s~Й•ta qutux s~Й•eЕ‹ qes~Й•ux kОІД§ul miman pajat rjax pajat ОІjaliЕ‹ mpux pitu rjax mpjut ro Д§nuqil, Д§ija ЙЈa К¦~КЁquliq tajal mК¦~КЁ;uОІuj s~Й•quliq Д§Е‹ijaЕ‹ nja, Д§ija ЙЈa mrД§uw na tajwan ЙЈenzjuminrok, pijux К¦~КЁalaj s~Й•Д§iju na ke Д§ija wajal ОІД§lun kokuminto na К¦~КЁina ro wajal naД§a pqilun rjax na kwiran na mlaОІuw s~Й•ОІД§ul. qutux s~Й•eЕ‹ qes~Й•ux kОІД§ul pus~Й•an qutux rjax tms~Й•uqan pinqwas~Й•an nja ОІiД§ "taj*ano reЙЈanto me*iК¦~КЁina lernejo" qutux s~Й•eЕ‹ qes~Й•ux kОІД§ul pus~Й•an qutux rjax mpux ОІjaliЕ‹ ЙЈa mОІinaД§ qalaЕ‹ tajal, mnaki ОІiД§ ОІjaojiЕ‹ na kowЙЈan, ОІК”ОІu kapan, s~Й•kura Е‹uД§ux ruma, ru qnazi kja. К¦~КЁalaj ЙЈa twaЕ‹ ps~Й•ОІaq jaw na klkaД§ Д§i, twaЕ‹ s~Й•ОІaq jaw na Д§tЙЈan llaqi, maki К¦~КЁalaj pintjawan nja jaw iЙЈok na qalaЕ‹ na tajal qa los~Й•iЕ‹ watan qani, qutux loji ЙЈa mus~Й•a mtama ЙЈalan ЙЈnОІaЕ‹ ke qa tajal ki s~Й•exu na nipun qa Д§ija uji. kja Д§aji qutux s~Й•eЕ‹ qes~Й•ux kОІД§ul s~Й•patula maЙЈal kawas~Й• pajat rjax nas~Й•a ЙЈam tama ЙЈi-jiЕ‹ qa "taj*ano ЙЈuОІernies~Й•tro" tms~Й•uqanmins~Й•ajiЕ‹ qa pintriqan na К¦~КЁinОІwanan qani lЙЈa, mОІinaД§ kinД§ulan nja qalaЕ‹ ms~Й•ОІtunux kja, ro wajal mtama te qutux К¦~КЁintman na tajwan s~Й•iЕ‹ЙЈijiЕ‹ rjax qa qutux s~Й•eЕ‹ kawas~Й• qes~Й•ux kОІД§ul miman s~Й•ajiЕ‹ rjax nas~Й•a, ptnaq kawas~Й• kja, kja Д§aji mupx qutux ОІjaliЕ‹ s~Й•kura jaw na wajal ms~Й•qun mlaД§uj "takas~Й•aЙЈo *amilio kons~Й•ilio", s~Й•njan naД§a kjos~Й•ato qa watan los~Й•iЕ‹ qani ro jupun naД§a ulu, rjax nas~Й•a ЙЈluw na К¦~КЁД§o qa s~Й•ajiЕ‹ Д§i ЙЈa ptnaqan naД§a pjapun ro jupun kulu uji. ОІnrwan qa ЙЈalan К¦~КЁpuЕ‹ .
